root_cause_text: Non-idempotent retry logic in the ingestion pipeline caused duplicate inserts on partial failure.
model_input:
Extract a structured data-quality lesson from this resolved incident.

INCIDENT:
  URN: urn:li:incident:reflex-demo-dup-rows-001
  Title: Duplicate transactions detected
  Type: DATA_QUALITY
  Description: A partial ingestion failure caused the pipeline to retry, inserting ~340 duplicate transaction IDs into the dataset.

HUMAN-CONFIRMED ROOT CAUSE:
Non-idempotent retry logic in the ingestion pipeline caused duplicate inserts on partial failure.

Extract the following fields as a JSON object matching the LessonExtractionResult schema:
- failure_category: one of ['duplicate_rows', 'freshness_violation', 'orphaned_ownership', 'other', 'schema_drift']
- trigger: one of ['employee_offboarding', 'pipeline_delay', 'retry_after_partial_failure', 'schema_change', 'unknown']
- vulnerable_characteristics: list of ['append_only_without_idempotency', 'no_automated_ownership_review', 'no_freshness_monitoring', 'no_schema_validation']
- candidate_control_type: one of ['active_ownership', 'uniqueness']
- target_field: the primary field for the control
- propagation_scope: domains or tags for propagation
- assumptions: list of assumptions
- limitations: list of known limitations
- confidence: one of [high, medium, low, unknown]
raw_output:
{
  "failure_category": "duplicate_rows",
  "trigger": "retry_after_partial_failure",
  "vulnerable_characteristics": [
    "append_only_without_idempotency"
  ],
  "candidate_control_type": "uniqueness",
  "target_field": "transaction_id",
  "propagation_scope": [
    "finance"
  ],
  "assumptions": [
    "transaction_id is the business key for deduplication",
    "All duplicate rows share the same transaction_id"
  ],
  "limitations": [
    "Control only detects exact duplicate transaction_ids",
    "Near-duplicates with different transaction_ids will not be detected"
  ],
  "confidence": "high"
}

assumptions: transaction_id is the business key for deduplication
All duplicate rows share the same transaction_id
limitations: Control only detects exact duplicate transaction_ids
Near-duplicates with different transaction_ids will not be detected
